creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
Firefox3 doesn't detect any plugins installed under /usr/local/lib/browser_plugins (i.e. gnash, dvju, java). The only plugin available is libnullplugin.so from /usr/local/lib/firefox3/plugins/.

If I create symlink to, say, /usr/local/lib/browser_plugins/libgnashplugin.so in /usr/local/lib/firefox3/plugins/, the plugin is detected and works properly.
